technology.title: CISA Tells US Agencies to Fix Security Bugs in as Little as 3 Days Thanks to AI Threats
technology.summary: “Defenders cannot afford to take weeks to patch,” one Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency official warned on Wednesday.

briefing.news_focus: “Defenders cannot afford to take weeks to patch,” one Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency official warned on Wednesday.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國網絡安全與基礎設施安全局（CISA）近日發出警告，要求各政府機構在面對人工智慧（AI）帶來的安全威脅時，必須在最短三天內修補安全漏洞。CISA官員強調，防禦者無法再容忍數週的修補時間，因為AI技術的快速發展使得安全漏洞的利用風險大幅增加。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，網絡安全的威脅也日益增加。CISA作為美國政府的網絡安全監管機構，負責保護國家基礎設施免受網絡攻擊。近期的報告指出，AI技術不僅能被用來加強防禦，還可能被攻擊者利用來自動化攻擊過程，這使得修補漏洞的速度變得至關重要。CISA的警告反映了政府對於快速應對新興威脅的迫切需求，尤其是在數位基礎設施日益依賴於技術的背景下。
briefing.analysis: CISA的要求顯示出對於網絡安全的高度重視，尤其是在AI技術日益普及的情況下。各政府機構面臨的挑戰在於如何在有限的時間內有效修補漏洞，這可能需要更多的資源和人力投入。此舉也可能促使企業和機構重新評估其安全策略，強化內部的漏洞管理流程。不同機構間的反應可能會有所不同，部分機構可能會因為資源不足而難以達到CISA的要求，這可能導致安全防護的差異化。此外，這項政策的實施效果將取決於各機構的合作程度及其對於新技術的適應能力。

technology.title: Who pays when rockets explode? China insures SpaceX’s rivals in orbital race against US
technology.summary: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion-dollar rocket gamble. In 2016, a SpaceX rocket carrying a satellite blew up during a test, destroying on-board equipment and surrounding facilities worth millions of US dollars. Fortunately, the satellite operator, Israel’s Space Communications, had an insurance policy worth almost...

briefing.news_focus: This is part of a series on the global impact of SpaceX’s historic IPO, tracing how mainland Chinese investors’ strategies, the Hong Kong market and wider capital flows are being reshaped by Elon Musk’s trillion-dollar rocket gamble. In 2016, a SpaceX rocket carrying a satellite blew up during a test, destroying on-board equipment and surrounding facilities worth millions of US dollars. Fortunately, the satellite operator, Israel’s Space Communications, had an insurance policy worth almost...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國正在為SpaceX的競爭對手提供保險，以應對火箭發射過程中可能發生的爆炸事件。這一舉措反映了中國投資者在面對SpaceX的IPO影響下，如何調整其策略。報導提到，2016年SpaceX的一次火箭測試中發生爆炸，造成數百萬美元的損失，但衛星運營商以色列的Space Communications因擁有保險而得以彌補損失。
briefing.background: SpaceX的IPO被視為一個重要的市場事件，可能會改變整個航天產業的格局。隨著SpaceX在商業航天領域的領先地位，其他國家和公司也在加緊發展自己的太空計畫。中國的投資者在這一背景下，開始為競爭對手提供保險，顯示出他們在全球航天競爭中的日益活躍。這種保險策略不僅能降低風險，還可能促進更多的資本流入航天產業，進一步推動技術創新和市場競爭。
briefing.analysis: 中國為SpaceX競爭對手提供保險的舉措，顯示出其在全球航天市場中的戰略布局。這一行動可能會促使其他國家或公司考慮類似的保險安排，以減少發射失敗帶來的經濟損失。參考報導提到SpaceX的IPO可能會改變市場格局，這意味著未來的競爭將更加激烈，尤其是在資金和技術的投入上。各方利益關係複雜，SpaceX的成功可能會吸引更多資本流向其競爭對手，導致市場的重新洗牌。中國的保險策略或許能在這場競爭中為其企業帶來優勢，但也可能引發其他國家的警覺和反制措施。

supporting_titles: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
supporting_summaries: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

technology.title: China builds a rival satellite constellation as SpaceX goes public
technology.summary: A Chinese state-backed satellite company is signing the partners and governments Starlink has pushed aside, days before SpaceX’s record listing.

briefing.news_focus: A Chinese state-backed satellite company is signing the partners and governments Starlink has pushed aside, days before SpaceX’s record listing.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國一家國有支持的衛星公司正在簽署與那些被SpaceX的Starlink排除在外的合作夥伴和政府的協議。這一舉動發生在SpaceX即將進行創紀錄的上市之際，顯示出中國在衛星互聯網領域的積極布局，意圖挑戰SpaceX的市場地位。
briefing.background: 隨著全球對衛星互聯網需求的增加，SpaceX的Starlink已經在市場上取得了顯著的成功，並吸引了多個國家的合作。然而，中國在此領域的發展也不容小覷，政府對科技產業的支持使得中國企業能夠迅速擴展其衛星網絡。中國的衛星計畫不僅旨在提供商業服務，還有助於提升國家在全球科技競爭中的地位，並增強其在國際市場上的影響力。
briefing.analysis: 中國衛星公司的這一舉動可能會對SpaceX的市場份額造成威脅，特別是在那些對SpaceX的服務不滿意或未能達成合作的國家。這也反映出中國在高科技領域的競爭策略，試圖通過與其他國家和企業建立合作關係來擴大其影響力。SpaceX的上市將使其資金流入加速，進一步強化其市場地位，但中國的競爭可能迫使其調整策略以應對新的挑戰。各方利益的角力將可能影響未來衛星互聯網市場的格局，特別是在亞洲和其他發展中國家。

politics.title: US and Iran trade fire after Trump threatens Tehran over stalled talks | First Thing
politics.summary: Iran says US attacks make ceasefire ‘practically meaningless’. Plus, Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ when asked about jump to 4.2% Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Sign up here Good morning. Has the ceasefire collapsed yet? What is the status of negotiations? Talks to turn the ceasefire into a durable peace deal have stalled for weeks, with periodic flare-ups as both sides continued to launch limited strikes and trade blame for violating the truce. What do the two sides want? Iran seeks the lifting of international sanctions, the unfreezing of billions of dollars in assets, and control over the strait of Hormuz. Trump has said any future peace deal must prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon, which Tehran denies it is seeking to do. This is a developing story. Follow our live coverage here . What did Gates say? “I support the release of all the Epstein files and sincerely hope that, through your efforts and those of others advocating on their behalf, the survivors of Epstein’s crimes can get the justice that they deserve.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Iran says US attacks make ceasefire ‘practically meaningless’. Plus, Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ when asked about jump to 4.2% Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Talks to turn the ceasefire into a durable peace deal have stalled for weeks, with periodic flare-ups as both sides continued to launch limited strikes and trade blame for violating the truce. What do the two sides want? Iran seeks the lifting of international sanctions, the unfreezing of billions of dollars in assets, and control over the strait of Hormuz. Trump has said any future peace deal must prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon, which Tehran denies it is seeking to do. This is a developing story. Follow our live coverage here . What did Gates say? “I support the release of all the Epstein files and sincerely hope that, through your efforts and those of others advocating on their behalf, the survivors of Epstein’s crimes can get the justice that they deserve.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國與伊朗之間的緊張局勢再度升級，雙方在停火談判陷入僵局後，互相發動攻擊。伊朗表示，美國的攻擊使得停火協議幾乎失去意義。特朗普則強調，任何未來的和平協議必須阻止伊朗發展核武器，儘管伊朗否認有此意圖。此事件顯示出雙方在持續的軍事衝突中互相指責，並未達成實質進展。
briefing.background: 美國與伊朗的關係長期緊張，尤其是在特朗普政府期間，對伊朗實施了嚴厲的經濟制裁，並要求其放棄核武計劃。近期的停火談判旨在將臨時停火轉化為持久和平協議，但由於雙方在制裁解除及核問題上的根本分歧，談判進展緩慢。伊朗希望解除國際制裁並獲得資產解凍，而美方則強調必須確保伊朗不會發展核武器。這種情況下，雙方的軍事行動不斷升級，使得和平前景更加渺茫。
briefing.analysis: 美國與伊朗之間的軍事衝突加劇，特別是特朗普對伊朗的強硬言辭，顯示出他在面對國內外壓力時的強硬立場。特朗普在參考報導中提到將加大對伊朗的攻擊，這可能是對伊朗持續挑釁行為的直接回應。另一方面，伊朗則強調美國的攻擊行為使得停火協議失去意義，這顯示出雙方在軍事行動上的互動將進一步影響和平談判的前景。若雙方無法達成共識，未來可能會導致更大規模的衝突，並影響地區穩定。

supporting_titles: Tehran will ‘pay the price’, says Trump after U.S., Iran exchange strikes
supporting_summaries: “We are gonna be attacking them, attacking them very hard,” Mr. Trump told reporters on Wednesday. “We hit them hard yesterday, and we are going to hit them again hard today”

politics.title: West Asia war updates: Iran announces closure of Strait of Hormuz after U.S. attacks
politics.summary: Two 'violating ships' attempting passage through Hormuz hit, Iranian media says; Iran's UN ambassador Amir Saeid Iravani rejected Trump's threat, saying "no sustainable deal can be reached through threats, intimidation, or the use of force."

briefing.news_focus: Two 'violating ships' attempting passage through Hormuz hit, Iranian media says; Iran's UN ambassador Amir Saeid Iravani rejected Trump's threat, saying "no sustainable deal can be reached through threats, intimidation, or the use of force."
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗宣布關閉霍爾木茲海峽，因為兩艘被指控違規的船隻在通過該海峽時遭到攻擊。伊朗駐聯合國大使阿米爾·薩伊德·伊拉瓦尼對特朗普的威脅表示拒絕，強調「透過威脅、恐嚇或武力無法達成可持續的協議」。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球最重要的石油運輸通道之一，伊朗與美國之間的緊張關係持續升級。自從今年四月雙方達成脆弱的停火協議以來，雙方之間的衝突時有發生。美國近期的空襲行動被視為對伊朗的重大挑釁，尤其是在美國直升機在霍爾木茲海峽被擊落後，這一系列攻擊被認為是對停火協議的嚴重破壞。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件顯示出美伊之間的緊張局勢再度升級。根據參考報導，伊朗革命衛隊聲稱已對美國在科威特、巴林和約旦的18個目標發動攻擊，這表明伊朗對美國的軍事行動做出了強烈反擊。另一方面，美國國防部長表示如果需要，將會進行強有力的回應，顯示出美方對於進一步軍事行動的決心。這種情勢可能導致雙方進一步的軍事對抗，並使得原本脆弱的停火協議岌岌可危。各方的立場差異在於美國希望透過軍事壓力迫使伊朗回到談判桌，而伊朗則堅持其主權與防衛權，拒絕在威脅下進行談判。

supporting_titles: Iran says 18 targets hit across US bases, Strait of Hormuz closed
Is the Iran ceasefire over? What the latest US attacks tell us
supporting_summaries: Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps says it hit 18 targets at US bases in Kuwait, Bahrain and Jordan.

A wave of US strikes represents the gravest test yet of the fragile truce. Here’s what happened, what officials are saying and whether the deal can survive Middle East crisis – live updates The US has launched a wave of strikes across southern Iran for a second consecutive day. Although there have been several breaches since a ceasefire was agreed between the two sides in April, the attacks this week – launched after the downing of a US helicopter over the strait of Hormuz – represent the most serious and extensive breakdown of the truce to date. The US president, Donald Trump, has raised the prospect of further attacks, while his defence secretary, Pete Hegseth, has told reporters if strikes “have to happen [Friday] night, they will be strong and they will be clear”. Continue reading...

politics.title: Has Beijing given up on a nuclear weapon-free Korean peninsula?
politics.summary: China might be downplaying nuclear weapons by not mentioning the issue after Xi Jinping’s visit to North Korea but that does not mean it has accepted its neighbour’s growing arsenal, according to analysts. Neither Beijing nor Pyongyang mentioned nuclear weapons or denuclearisation in their statements on the Chinese president’s two-day state visit to Pyongyang this week. Since Xi’s summit with US President Donald Trump in May, observers have been speculating that Beijing’s stance on Pyongyang’s...

briefing.news_focus: China might be downplaying nuclear weapons by not mentioning the issue after Xi Jinping’s visit to North Korea but that does not mean it has accepted its neighbour’s growing arsenal, according to analysts. Neither Beijing nor Pyongyang mentioned nuclear weapons or denuclearisation in their statements on the Chinese president’s two-day state visit to Pyongyang this week. Since Xi’s summit with US President Donald Trump in May, observers have been speculating that Beijing’s stance on Pyongyang’s...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國國家主席習近平近期對北韓進行為期兩天的國事訪問，但在雙方的聲明中，並未提及核武器或無核化議題。分析人士指出，這並不意味著北京已經接受北韓日益增長的核武庫，反而可能是在淡化此議題的表現。習近平與美國總統特朗普在五月的峰會後，觀察者對北京在平壤的立場產生了新的猜測。
briefing.background: 中國與北韓的關係一直以來都受到核武問題的影響。北韓的核武發展引起了國際社會的廣泛關注，尤其是美國及其盟友的強烈反對。過去，北京一直主張無核化，並在多次國際會議中呼籲北韓停止核武計劃。然而，隨著北韓核武能力的增強，中國的立場似乎出現了微妙變化。習近平的訪問可能反映出中國在面對北韓核問題時的策略調整，尤其是在美中關係緊張的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 此次習近平訪問北韓卻未提及核武問題，可能顯示出中國在對待北韓核武問題上的策略轉變。分析人士認為，中國可能在尋求維持與北韓的穩定關係的同時，避免直接對抗美國的立場。這種策略可能是基於對地區安全局勢的考量，尤其是在美國對北韓的制裁政策仍然存在的情況下。另一方面，北韓可能會解讀為中國對其核武發展的默許，這可能會加劇地區的緊張局勢。未來，中國如何平衡與北韓的關係及其在國際社會中的角色，將成為觀察的重點。

economy.title: Trump says 'I love the inflation' as US prices rise at fastest rate in three years
economy.summary: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.

briefing.news_focus: The US president later said he had meant that he actually loved that inflation was not higher.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普在白宮發言時表示他「喜愛通脹」，這是在最新數據顯示美國通脹率達到三年來的最高點4.2%之後的評論。特朗普隨後澄清，他的意思是通脹並沒有更高，顯示出對當前經濟狀況的某種樂觀態度。
briefing.background: 在伊朗戰爭的影響下，美國的通脹率從2.4%上升至4.2%，這是自該衝突開始以來的第三個月連續上升。霍爾木茲海峽的封閉對能源價格造成了影響，進一步推高了通脹。這一經濟現象引發了對美國經濟穩定性的關注，尤其是在全球市場不確定性增加的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的言論引發了市場的廣泛關注，尤其是在通脹上升的背景下。不同於以往對通脹的擔憂，特朗普似乎在試圖傳達一種對經濟復甦的信心，這與一些經濟學家的看法形成對比，他們認為高通脹可能會對消費者信心和經濟增長造成壓力。此外，參考報導指出，通脹的上升與伊朗戰爭的影響密切相關，這使得能源價格上漲，進一步加劇了市場的不穩定性。未來，若通脹持續上升，可能會影響美國的貨幣政策及選民對政府經濟管理的信任。

supporting_titles: Trump says ‘I love the inflation’ as rate rises to 4.2% amid Iran war pressure
supporting_summaries: Before the conflict began, inflation was at 2.4%, but the closure of the strait of Hormuz has affected energy prices Donald Trump said “I love the inflation” after new data showed that inflation jumped to an annual rate of 4.2% in May, the third consecutive monthly increase since the start of the Iran war and a three-year high. Speaking from the White House on Wednesday, the US president said that he was not concerned about inflation because of recent developments in the conflict. Continue reading...

economy.title: China, Hong Kong stocks fall as AI bubble fears build up
economy.summary: Asia-Pacific shares fell to a three-week low as fresh US strikes on Iran and concerns about an artificial intelligence (AI) bubble rattled markets around the world. The MSCI All Country Asia-Pacific Index dropped about 0.4 per cent on Thursday. Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Index fell 0.7 per cent, while the mainland CSI 300 Index dropped 0.6 per cent. The Kospi in South Korea rose 0.4 per cent. Brent crude, the global benchmark, climbed above US$95 a barrel before easing as renewed fighting in the...

briefing.news_focus: Asia-Pacific shares fell to a three-week low as fresh US strikes on Iran and concerns about an artificial intelligence (AI) bubble rattled markets around the world. The MSCI All Country Asia-Pacific Index dropped about 0.4 per cent on Thursday. Hong Kong’s Hang Seng Index fell 0.7 per cent, while the mainland CSI 300 Index dropped 0.6 per cent. The Kospi in South Korea rose 0.4 per cent. Brent crude, the global benchmark, climbed above US$95 a barrel before easing as renewed fighting in the...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 亞洲太平洋股市因對人工智慧（AI）泡沫的擔憂及美國對伊朗的新一波攻擊而下跌，跌至三週低點。周四，MSCI亞洲太平洋指數下滑約0.4%，香港恒生指數下跌0.7%，而中國內地的CSI 300指數則下降0.6%。與此同時，南韓的Kospi指數上漲0.4%。布倫特原油價格在重新升高至每桶95美元以上後有所回落，顯示出市場的不穩定性。
briefing.background: 近期，全球市場因地緣政治緊張局勢和經濟前景不明而受到影響。美國對伊朗的軍事行動引發了市場的不安，進一步加劇了投資者對市場的擔憂。此外，人工智慧技術的迅速發展引發了對其可持續性及潛在泡沫的質疑，尤其是在中國及其周邊國家的科技產業中，這種擔憂尤為明顯。參考報導指出，AI的興起可能掩蓋了中國經濟的結構性問題，這使得日本、南韓和台灣等國面臨產業衰退的風險。
briefing.analysis: 市場對AI泡沫的擔憂主要源於對其長期可持續性的質疑，尤其是在中國經濟面臨挑戰的背景下。參考報導提到，AI的發展可能掩蓋了中國經濟的結構性問題，這使得周邊國家如日本和南韓的產業也受到影響。這些國家可能因為過度依賴中國市場而面臨更大的經濟風險。隨著市場情緒的波動，投資者可能會重新評估科技股的價值，進一步影響股市走勢。此外，地緣政治的緊張局勢也可能加劇市場的不穩定性，未來幾周將是觀察市場反應的重要時期。

supporting_titles: Japan, South Korea and Taiwan are suffering industrial rot
supporting_summaries: Artificial intelligence is concealing a China shock

economy.title: J&T faces risk of tougher penalties, higher costs as China opens formal safety probe
economy.summary: China’s postal regulator has opened an investigation into J&T Express over failures in safety management, escalating scrutiny of the courier operator and raising investors’ concerns about the impact of heavier penalties, higher compliance costs and safety oversight on its international operations. The State Post Bureau said on Thursday it had formally launched a case against J&T Express Co after multiple work process safety accidents occurred this year at enterprises using the J&T brand,...

briefing.news_focus: China’s postal regulator has opened an investigation into J&T Express over failures in safety management, escalating scrutiny of the courier operator and raising investors’ concerns about the impact of heavier penalties, higher compliance costs and safety oversight on its international operations. The State Post Bureau said on Thursday it had formally launched a case against J&T Express Co after multiple work process safety accidents occurred this year at enterprises using the J&T brand,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國郵政監管機構已對J&T Express展開正式調查，原因是該快遞公司在安全管理上存在失誤，這使得市場對於可能面臨的更嚴厲處罰和合規成本上升感到擔憂。國家郵政局於週四宣布，因為多起使用J&T品牌的企業發生工作過程中的安全事故，已對該公司啟動案件調查。
briefing.background: J&T Express是一家在東南亞及中國運營的快遞公司，近年來隨著電子商務的蓬勃發展，其業務迅速擴張。然而，隨著市場競爭加劇及監管環境的變化，快遞行業面臨的安全管理要求也日益嚴格。中國政府對於快遞行業的監管力度加強，特別是在安全和合規性方面，這使得J&T Express的經營面臨更大的挑戰。此次調查的啟動，可能會影響其在中國市場的運營及國際擴展計劃。
briefing.analysis: J&T Express面臨的調查可能會導致更高的合規成本和潛在的罰款，這對其財務狀況及未來的國際業務拓展構成威脅。投資者對此表示擔憂，因為這可能會影響公司的盈利能力及市場競爭力。參考報導中提到的特斯拉在中國的召回事件，雖然主題不同，但同樣反映出中國市場對於企業安全管理的高度重視，這可能會促使其他企業在安全合規方面加強自我檢查。不同於J&T的情況，特斯拉的問題主要是技術性，且已計劃進行修復，這顯示出各行業在面對安全問題時的不同應對策略。
